extensions.name: Discord
extensions.description: Discord channel integration and messaging. Browse channels, read messages, and give your agent the ability to post to Discord.
extensions.author: ProjectRose

extensions.name: Email
extensions.description: IMAP email management with spam filtering and prompt injection protection. Let your agent read, triage, and manage your inbox.
extensions.author: ProjectRose

extensions.name: Git
extensions.description: Full-featured Git UI: branches, commits, diffs, staging, stashes, tags, and remote operations.
extensions.author: ProjectRose

extensions.name: Docker
extensions.description: Docker container management via docker-compose. Inspect containers, view logs, start/stop services.
extensions.author: ProjectRose

extensions.name: Listen
extensions.description: Active listening with speaker diarization. Train the model on your team's voices and get speaker-labeled transcripts.
extensions.author: ProjectRose
